Input OTP

OTP (One-Time Password) input with individual digit boxes using <lyte-input> Slyte DOM. Each digit is a separate input; auto-focus advances to the next box on entry.

Form Figma Synced 2 Counts × 5 States
4-Digit OTP — Default
4-Digit
HTML
<!-- 4-Digit OTP — Default -->
<div class="zc-otp-group zc-otp-4">
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1"></lyte-input>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-otp-group {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
}
.zc-otp-input,
.zc-otp-input input {
  width: 40px;
  height: 40px;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 18px;
  border: 1px solid var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #D5D6D9);
  border-radius: var(--zc-radius-r, 6px);
}
6-Digit OTP — Default
6-Digit
HTML
<!-- 6-Digit OTP — Default -->
<div class="zc-otp-group zc-otp-6">
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1"></lyte-input>
</div>
4-Digit OTP — Focus
4-Digit
HTML
<!-- Focus state is automatic on :focus, or use .zc-otp-focus class -->
<div class="zc-otp-group zc-otp-4">
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input zc-otp-focus" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1"></lyte-input>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-otp-input:focus-within,
.zc-otp-input.zc-otp-focus,
.zc-otp-input.zc-otp-focus input {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-primary-border-primary-border-default, #0D4EF2);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--zc-color-primary-surface-primary-surface-subtle, #F5F8FE);
}
4-Digit OTP — Filled
4-Digit
HTML
<!-- Filled — each input has a value -->
<div class="zc-otp-group zc-otp-4">
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="5"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="3"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="8"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="1"></lyte-input>
</div>
6-Digit OTP — Filled
6-Digit
HTML
<!-- 6-Digit Filled -->
<div class="zc-otp-group zc-otp-6">
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="7"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="2"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="9"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="4"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="0"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="6"></lyte-input>
</div>
4-Digit OTP — Error
4-Digit
HTML
<!-- Error — add .zc-otp-error to group -->
<div class="zc-otp-group zc-otp-4 zc-otp-error">
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="5"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="3"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="8"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="1"></lyte-input>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-otp-error .zc-otp-input,
.zc-otp-error .zc-otp-input input {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-error-border-error-border-default, #CC1914);
}
6-Digit OTP — Error
6-Digit
HTML
<!-- 6-Digit Error -->
<div class="zc-otp-group zc-otp-6 zc-otp-error">
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="7"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="2"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="9"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="4"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="0"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="6"></lyte-input>
</div>
4-Digit OTP — Success
4-Digit
HTML
<!-- Success — add .zc-otp-success to group -->
<div class="zc-otp-group zc-otp-4 zc-otp-success">
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="5"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="3"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="8"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="1"></lyte-input>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-otp-success .zc-otp-input,
.zc-otp-success .zc-otp-input input {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-success-border-success-border-default, #078841);
}
6-Digit OTP — Success
6-Digit
HTML
<!-- 6-Digit Success -->
<div class="zc-otp-group zc-otp-6 zc-otp-success">
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="7"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="2"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="9"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="4"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="0"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-value="6"></lyte-input>
</div>
4-Digit OTP — Disabled
4-Digit
HTML
<!-- Disabled — use lt-prop-disabled on each lyte-input -->
<div class="zc-otp-group zc-otp-4 zc-otp-disabled">
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-disabled="true"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-disabled="true"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-disabled="true"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-disabled="true"></lyte-input>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-otp-disabled,
.zc-otp-group.zc-otp-disabled {
  opacity: 0.45;
  cursor: not-allowed;
  pointer-events: none;
}
6-Digit OTP — Disabled
6-Digit
HTML
<!-- 6-Digit Disabled -->
<div class="zc-otp-group zc-otp-6 zc-otp-disabled">
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-disabled="true"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-disabled="true"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-disabled="true"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-disabled="true"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-disabled="true"></lyte-input>
  <lyte-input class="zc-otp-input" lt-prop-placeholder="·" lt-prop-max-length="1" lt-prop-disabled="true"></lyte-input>
</div>
